title: [天下圍攻] 跨國國會應對中國聯盟 (IPAC) 正式成立！

replies.msg:
由不同民主國家既國會議員組成既跨國對中國事務聯盟聯盟 (Inter-Parliamentary Alliance on China) ，目的係認真團結面對中國獨裁對世界既不良影響
成員包括大家好熟悉既 macro rubio，五眼聯盟既國會成員，日本國會，歐洲議會等等

replies.msg: 美中不足係冇契爺 Solomon Yue
係時候由各國議會一齊合作，夾實佢哋個政府同心反支

目的 （全部都係針對中國做唔到既野）：

Safeguarding international rules-based order （保護國際秩序）
The People’s Republic of China must be held to the standards of the international legal order, which itself must be protected from distortion.

Upholding human rights（保護普世人權）
Relations between states and the PRC must give due prominence to universal human rights.

Promoting trade fairness （提倡公平貿易）
The PRC must be held to the standards of the rules-based order, especially those as set out by the World Trade Organisation.

Strengthening security （民主政體加強面對中國既安全）
Democracies must develop complementary security strategies to address challenges presented by the PRC.

Protecting national integrity （保護其他國家既主權同尊嚴）
（一帶一路？ ）
The PRC must not be permitted to compromise the sovereignty or institutions of any developed or emerging markets through lending, investment, or by any other means.

Members of the Inter-Parliamentary Alliance on China subscribe to the following principles:

1. Democratic states must maintain the integrity of their political systems, and actively seek to preserve a marketplace of ideas free from distortion.
2. A free, open, and rules-based international order that supports human dignity is created and maintained through intention. The persistence of such an order requires like-minded countries to participate actively in its governance and enforcement.
原來郭文貴唔係普通嘅痴線佬

加拿大議員 genuis: IPAC is an international cross-party alliance of democratic legislators aiming to strengthen our response to Chinese government actions.

https://twitter.com/GarnettGenuis/status/1268681210382909443

中共真係低估咗香港人嘅反抗。一個送中條例，創造咗過萬個識英文嘅反共網軍出黎，每人每日幾個鐘用心咁宣傳反共。勁過啲唔識英文，冇學識，hea住做嘅五毛多多聲。

仲未計唔知幾多萬香港人移民咗去外國，有當地人際網絡，大把係有學識個專業人士，個個喺本地人面前不停屌中共。

flagrant=conspicuously offensive
blatant=offensively conspicuous
你會見到美國用flagrant（措辭強烈啲），英國用blatant
